title: HEX escrow records the requested amount instead of the amount actually received
reason: Not reportable as a standalone issue here because the token is hardcoded to HEX rather than user-selectable; the short-transfer or fee-on-transfer failure mode only becomes exploitable if the contract is bound to unexpected token code, which is captured by F-003.

title: Trade settlement trusts ERC20 return values instead of verifying token balance changes
reason: Rejected as a separate finding because the contract does not accept arbitrary ERC20s. The realistic exploit requires the hardcoded `hexAddress` to point to non-HEX or attacker-controlled code, so this behavior is subsumed by F-003 rather than standing alone.
